items.name: blur-reveal
items.title: BlurReveal
items.description: A calm, spring-driven text reveal: opacity, blur, and a 16px rise settle together with no overshoot.

items.name: fade-in
items.title: FadeIn
items.description: A pure opacity fade for text — no movement, no scale, no blur. The simplest possible reveal.

items.name: slide-in
items.title: SlideIn
items.description: A direction-parameterized translate-and-fade entrance — text slides into place from up, down, left, or right on the house spring.

items.name: scale-in
items.title: ScaleIn
items.description: A subtle scale-from-slightly-smaller-and-fade entrance. No overshoot, no scale jumps — restrained on purpose.

items.name: rotate-in
items.title: RotateIn
items.description: Text rotates from a slight starting angle to 0° while fading in, on the house spring. Safe zone is [-12°, +12°].

items.name: mask-reveal
items.title: MaskReveal
items.description: Reveals text from behind a retreating clip-path mask. Hard pixel-sharp edge by design — no opacity fade, the moving edge is the fingerprint.

items.name: word-stagger
items.title: WordStagger
items.description: Multi-word text where each word fades and rises in sequence — the clearest demonstration of the Onda stagger fingerprint.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Character-by-character reveal with an optional accent-rose cursor. Linear-by-design — the catalog's one intentional exception, because typing rhythm has to be constant.

items.name: count-up
items.title: CountUp
items.description: An animated number that counts from `from` to `to` over `duration`, fading in on the house spring. Tabular nums, locale-grouped, deterministic.

items.name: draw-on
items.title: DrawOn
items.description: An SVG path that strokes itself in — the substrate for logos, icons, and signature flourishes. Powered by @remotion/paths's evolvePath.

items.name: grain-overlay
items.title: GrainOverlay
items.description: A subtle film-grain layer for the canvas — pure SVG turbulence, restrained at 2–4% opacity. The catalog's first atmospheric primitive: no text, no motion.

items.name: stagger-group
items.title: StaggerGroup
items.description: A composition primitive — reveals a list of items in sequence using the canonical Onda stagger (4 frames between siblings). The foundation for animated lists and sequenced reveals.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: A seamless looping horizontal scroll — logo strips, ticker tape, 'as featured in' rows. Slow and restrained on purpose. Intentionally linear (a marquee with spring acceleration would feel broken).

items.name: ken-burns
items.title: KenBurns
items.description: Slow zoom + pan over a photo — the iconic documentary motion. Restrained scale (1.0 → 1.1 default) over ~5 seconds. Intentionally linear for the constant slow-cinematic feel. The first cinematic primitive.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: A label-and-arrow annotation pointing at a specific spot on the canvas — tutorials, explainers, name-the-part. Bubble fades + scales in, arrow draws on after a small beat.

items.name: underline
items.title: Underline
items.description: Text that fades in, then an accent-rose underline draws beneath. Two-phase reveal: text first, accent second. One of the catalog's rare earned-color moments — reserved for emphasis.

items.name: captions
items.title: Captions
items.description: Sequential word-highlight captions driven by a captions array with millisecond timing. Active word brightens with a subtle scale pulse on SPRING_SMOOTH; inactive words sit at 70% opacity.

items.name: bar-chart
items.title: BarChart
items.description: Horizontal bars that grow from 0 to value with SPRING_SMOOTH. Single-accent palette: largest bar earns dusty rose, others stay --onda-dim.

items.name: lower-third
items.title: LowerThird
items.description: Broadcast-style name + role bar that slides in from the side with an accent underline. Composes SlideIn + FadeIn + Underline.

items.name: title-card
items.title: TitleCard
items.description: Hero title + subtitle pair. Composes BlurReveal + WordStagger + optional Underline. The hero screenshot scene.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: StatCard
items.description: Big number + label + accent rule. Composes CountUp + WordStagger + Underline. The flagship Onda data look.

items.name: quote-card
items.title: QuoteCard
items.description: Pull-quote with attribution and an accent-rose divider. Composes WordStagger + MaskReveal + FadeIn.

items.name: end-card
items.title: EndCard
items.description: Closing screen with CTA + social handles. Composes BlurReveal + StaggerGroup + optional Underline.

items.name: logo-sting
items.title: LogoSting
items.description: Branded reveal: SVG logo strokes in, title settles, accent rule lands last. Composes DrawOn + ScaleIn + Underline. Restraint is the whole point — no particles, no streaks.

items.name: camera-shake
items.title: CameraShake
items.description: Wraps children with a subtle decaying shake driven by Remotion's deterministic seeded random(). The only deterministic camera shake in the Remotion ecosystem.

items.name: gradient-shift
items.title: GradientShift
items.description: Animated gradient background — two colors interpolated, angle slowly rotates. Linear-by-design (a spring would settle the angle and defeat the constant drift). Low-saturation defaults.
